zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor de Crevequer於大約1245年出生在英國肯特福爾可斯同時，她的父親Hamo De Crevequer23歲，母親Baroness Maud of Buckland22歲。她於大約1269年與Bertram de Criol結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1301年11月13日享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor de Crevequer于大约1245年出生在英国肯特福爾可斯同时，她的父亲Hamo De Crevequer23岁，母亲Baroness Maud of Buckland22岁。她于大约1269年与Bertram de Criol结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1301年11月13日享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor de Crevequer was born about 1245, in Folkestone, Kent, England, her father, Hamo De Crevequer, was 23 and her mother, Baroness Maud of Buckland, was 22. She married Bertram de Criol about 1269. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 13 November 1301, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor de Crevequer est née environ 1245, à Folkestone, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Hamo De Crevequer, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Baroness Maud of Buckland, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Bertram de Criol environ 1269. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 13 novembre 1301, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor de Crevequer um 1245 in Folkestone, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hamo De Crevequer 23 und ihre Mutter Baroness Maud of Buckland 22. Sie hat um 1269 Bertram de Criol geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 13. November 1301 im Alter von 57 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de Crevequer è nata il circa 1245 nel Folkestone, Kent, England, sua padre, Hamo De Crevequer, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Baroness Maud of Buckland, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Bertram de Criol circa 1269. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 13 novembre 1301, all'età di 57 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Crevequer(이)가 대략 1245년 영국 켄트 폴케스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hamo De Crevequer(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Baroness Maud of Buckland(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1269년 Bertram de Criol(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1301년 11월 13일 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de Crevequer nasceu aproximadamente 1245, em Folkestone, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hamo De Crevequer, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Baroness Maud of Buckland, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Bertram de Criol aproximadamente 1269. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 13 de novembro de 1301, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor de Crevequer родилась около 1245 г. в местности фолкестоун, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Hamo De Crevequer было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Baroness Maud of Buckland, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Bertram de Criol около 1269 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 13 ноября 1301 г. в возрасте 57 лет.

Se casó con Bertram de Criol aproximadamente 1269. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 13 de noviembre de 1301, a la edad de 57 años.
